title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 478.370 - Divisions of Circuit No. 5, number — when judges elected
text:
478.370.  Divisions of Circuit No. 5, number — when judges elected. — 1.  There shall be four circuit judges in the fifth judicial circuit consisting of the counties of Buchanan and Andrew.  These judges shall sit in divisions numbered one, two, three and four.
  2.  The circuit judge in division two shall be elected in 1980.  The circuit judges in divisions one, three and four shall be elected in 1982.
(L. 1889 p. 73 §§ 1, 2, L. 1915 p. 257 § 1, A. 1949 S.B. 1140, A.L. 1959 S.B. 96, S.B. 151, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634, A.L. 1981 S.B. 24) 
Effective 1-01-82
